message:
🔒 fix: strict repo slug validation in pipeline handler (#8568) (#8577)

* 🔒 fix: strict repo slug validation in pipeline handler (#8568)

Replace loose strings.Contains+len check with a compiled regex that
enforces ^[a-zA-Z0-9._-]+/[a-zA-Z0-9._-]+$ — matches the Netlify
function counterpart and prevents path traversal in GitHub API URLs.

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* 🧪 test: update pipeline tests for strict repo regex

Update TestGHPIsAllowedRepo to verify path-traversal slugs are rejected
while valid owner/repo slugs are accepted. Update MutateRejectsUnknownRepo
to use a path-traversal input instead of a valid slug.

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
